title: Rustins BRITW1000 Quick Dry Brick & Tile 1L, Red
features: Durable Waterproofing for Brick and Tile Surfaces: Rustins Brick and Tile Protector provides long-lasting protection against water penetration and stains while maintaining a clean appearance
Enhances and Preserves the Natural Look: This clear protective formula brings out the natural beauty of bricks and tiles, offering a subtle finish that protects without altering the surface's charm

Easy Application for DIY and Professional Projects: Rustins Brick and Tile Protector can be effortlessly applied with a brush or roller, ensuring even coverage and effective protection; ADD TO BASKET now
Weatherproof Formula for All-Season Use: Designed to withstand harsh outdoor conditions, this protector shields surfaces from rain, frost, and UV damage, extending their lifespan significantly
Suitable for a Wide Range of Applications: Ideal for patios, walls, driveways, and more, Rustins Brick and Tile Protector delivers versatile performance for residential and commercial spaces
description: From the manufacturer Feature In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his shop in London's Shoreditch district where he wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. About Us Today, Rustins continues its research and development efforts on its markets of wood finishing, speciality paint and decorating. We continually bring to market product giving with advances in aware products, more good finishes and a good range of products to meet our growing international customers' wants.
